This contract provides interfaces and methods to: 1. Register agents on the official ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry 2. Read agent registration data 3. Post feedback to the ReputationRegistry Since the official ERC-8004 contracts may not be deployed on Celo Sepolia, this contract includes a mock implementation that follows the official interface.
